stages.name: ore
stages.metallurgical_operation: Extract raw gold-bearing ore from the earth
stages.manuscript_operation: Draft prose and raw claims from source material

stages.name: smelting
stages.metallurgical_operation: Heat ore to separate gold from slag and dross
stages.manuscript_operation: Remove filler, unsupported claims, and redundant prose

stages.name: assaying
stages.metallurgical_operation: Test a sample to determine gold content and impurities
stages.manuscript_operation: Validate every claim against evidence and citation

stages.name: cupellation
stages.metallurgical_operation: Refine by blowing air through molten lead-gold alloy
stages.manuscript_operation: Resolve cross-references and audit citation integrity

stages.name: certification
stages.metallurgical_operation: Certify purity grade and stamp hallmark
